name: Function Specification (FNS)
description: Definition of the set of all total, single-valued functions from set A to set B.

elements.text: f ⊆ A × B (f is a relation between A and B).
if a ∈ A, then there exists b ∈ B such that (a, b) ∈ f (the function is defined for every input in A).
if (a, b) ∈ f and (c, d) ∈ f and a = c, then b = d (single-valuedness: each input maps to exactly one output).
